info.title: Fixed Assets Service
info.description: Fixed asset lifecycle: capitalization, depreciation schedules, disposals, and impairments.

ApiError.description:
Standard API error envelope.

`error` is a machine-readable code (`not_found`, `validation_error`, etc.).
`message` is human-readable.  `request_id` is populated from the tracing
context already present in request extensions.  `details` carries per-field
errors for 422 responses.

CreateRunRequest.description: Request to execute a depreciation run for a tenant up to as_of_date.

DepreciationRun.description: A depreciation run: posts all unposted schedule periods up to as_of_date.

DepreciationSchedule.description: One period's planned depreciation for an asset (row in fa_depreciation_schedules).

Disposal.description: Row from fa_disposals (disposal_type cast to TEXT in queries).

DisposeAssetRequest.description: Request to dispose of or impair an asset.

proceeds_minor.description: Sale proceeds (only meaningful for disposal_type = sale). Defaults to 0.

GenerateScheduleRequest.description: Request to generate/refresh the depreciation schedule for a single asset.

PaginatedResponse_Asset.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

Generic paginated response envelope.

pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

items.description: A depreciation run: posts all unposted schedule periods up to as_of_date.
